source.title: Laundromutt naming sponsor for 2026 Dog Days of Kenmore

en.summary: Laundromutt is the naming sponsor for the 2026 Dog Days of Kenmore event.
en.why_irrelevant: It's a niche local pet business sponsorship far from typical user interests.

zh.summary: Laundromutt成为2026年肯莫尔犬日活动的冠名赞助商。
zh.why_irrelevant: 这是一个小众的本地宠物企业赞助，远离用户常见关注点。

brief: ICE shootings and policy changes dominate US news, while Supreme Court justices testify on security and Texas faces catastrophic flooding. Research explores collaborative writing, AI communication, and data visualization challenges.
news_summary: Several ICE shootings in Maine, Florida, and Houston have led to a pause on most vehicle stops, putting pressure on Senator Collins. Meanwhile, Supreme Court justices Kagan and Barrett testified on security threats, and Texas faces catastrophic flooding.
papers_summary: New research on collaborative writing games, AI-assisted email tone, and data narrative failures highlights human-AI interaction challenges. Visualization tools for cryptocurrency and graph sampling also feature.

en.brief: ICE shootings and policy changes dominate US news, while Supreme Court justices testify on security and Texas faces catastrophic flooding. Research explores collaborative writing, AI communication, and data visualization challenges.
en.news_summary: Several ICE shootings in Maine, Florida, and Houston have led to a pause on most vehicle stops, putting pressure on Senator Collins. Meanwhile, Supreme Court justices Kagan and Barrett testified on security threats, and Texas faces catastrophic flooding.
en.papers_summary: New research on collaborative writing games, AI-assisted email tone, and data narrative failures highlights human-AI interaction challenges. Visualization tools for cryptocurrency and graph sampling also feature.

zh.brief: Today's news highlights a Chinese dissident's perilous sea escape, SpaceX IPO jitters, and a T-rex fossil auction. Papers explore AI's role in creative writing and climate narratives, and data storytelling pitfalls.
zh.news_summary: Key news include the Taiwan Strait crossing of dissident Dong Guangping, reaction to South China Sea arbitration anniversary, and the 'double removal' of Ma Xingrui. Also: Gibraltar border opens, SpaceX IPO cools, and a T-rex fossil heads to auction.
zh.papers_summary: Research on collaborative game-based writing (FIERO), emotional climate narratives on TikTok, and the impact of AI-assisted email tone. A taxonomy of data narrative failures is also published.

todays_image.caption: Sailors navigate treacherous waters, much like Senator Collins faces political turbulence after an ICE shooting in her coastal home state of Maine.
todays_image.title: Sailors
